Best Free Alternatives to Gemini (2026)

Looking for a free or cheaper alternative to Gemini? Here are the top options.

ChatGPT

The most widely used AI chatbot for writing, research, coding help, and everyday questions.

✅ Free tier available

Claude

An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.

✅ Free tier available

Perplexity

An AI-powered answer engine that cites sources for every response.

✅ Free tier available

Notion AI

AI features built directly into the Notion workspace for notes, docs, and databases.

💲 Paid only
